subcodes.first_line: O thou who art beneficent! Be thou benevolent in the days of thy Lord through the propagation of His Cause amongst His servants. Blessed art thou for having shattered the idol [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محسن کن محسنا فی ایام ربک و هو تبلیغ امری بین العباد طوبی لک بما کسرت صنم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
